title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.215 - Cooperation authorized, when
text:
266.215.  Cooperation authorized, when. — The director may cooperate with and enter into agreements with governmental agencies of this state, other states, agencies of the federal government, and private associations in order to carry out the purpose and provisions of sections 266.152 to 266.220.
(L. 1972 S.B. 506 § 15) 
Effective 1-01-73
